text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Love me~♡ Love you~♡ It's Loves Only You~♡

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Let's all chat a lot again today, okay♪
—What should the ideal relationship between an Umamusume and their fans look like.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: For my early morning training, I go for runs outside the academy. Lately I've been running along the river and up to the hilltop.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: The air is clear and feels nice, and it's easy to film too.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: "I want to follow your example!" …Hehe, thank you ♡ For me, it's usually around 15 km round trip, but just do what feels manageable for you♪

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Oh, [ Middle-aged Lifter ] who just commented— you asked me a question last week, right? I made a video on "How to Work Out Without Hurting Your Body." I'll show it now♪

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Keep your elbow steady like this, and if you avoid using momentum to lift, you'll reduce your risk of injury.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: "I've been keeping up with my workouts~!" …Fufu, [ 3-Day Type Girl ], you're not giving up after three days anymore. I think that's really great♪

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: And also, I want you to think about your diet together with your training. I thought I'd talk about it, so I made a cooking video too~♡

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: You know, this is actually a dish I often make for myself. It's pretty high in protein, but it's got a nice balance of nutrients too.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Stir-fried veggies with sesame oil and chicken breast go perfectly together♪ [ Love's Cooking Special ]...? Hehe, well then, shall we do it next time♡

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Well then, that's all for tonight. Love me~♡ Love you~♡ It's Loves Only You~♡
This is dummy text for the wipe playback at the end of the broadcast.
That was a good stream... Well then.

text_block_list.name: 3-Day Type Girl
text_block_list.text: 『Ah~! Loves-chan praised me… I'm so happy…! She even taught me a cooking recipe, so I'll keep up with the training!』

text_block_list.name: Middle-aged Lifter
text_block_list.text: 『I'll also try it while paying attention to form, just like the advice I got! I feel like I can do my best now!』
The ones gathered here are fans of the Umamusume, Loves Only You. They are members of the community she runs.
I was interested in the way the community formed by Umamusumes and fans works, and by chance I ended up here. Since then, I too have been a commu-men
choice_data_list: <size=40>Alright then, I'll be heading out for today.</size>

text_block_list.name: Passionate Teacher
text_block_list.text: 『Oh! Good work, Bridge-san!』
I enjoyed those quiet, slightly strange moments, spending time with fellow fans whose faces and names I didn't even know and cheering on an Umamusume as she worked toward her debut.
Then one day, I spotted a familiar face staying behind for extra training. …Well, "familiar" might be a stretch, we hadn't actually spoken before.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… maybe finishing stretch isn't quite there? …Oh?
Um… did you need something from me?
choice_data_list: <size=36>Ah, no—it's just, I thought it was… a good run.</size>

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hehe, thank you. Say, you're a trainer, aren't you?
If you don't mind, could you give me some advice?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hehe, thank you. Say, you're a trainer, right?
If you don't mind, could you give me some advice?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: …Yeah, the posture you showed me, raising my upper body a little, really suits me. As expected, a pro is different.
choice_data_list: No, I'm still just a complete rookie…

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Really? But my times have actually gotten faster,
so for me, it was really helpful advice ♪

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Looks like I'll have a nice update to share with the commumem during the next stream ♪ …Oh, bythe way, "commumem" means the members of my fan community.
I know. Of course I do. But here... I have to carry myself as a trainer. I hold back my excitement as a fan, telling myself it's best to just pretend not know.
choice_data_list: <size=30>Streaming, hu… must be tough even though you're busy.</size>
<size=30>Streaming, huh… must be tough even though you're busy.</size>

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's not hard at all. I've been doing this for years now, after all
In the flow of conversation, I decided to ask something I'd been curious about for a while I finally decided to ask what I'd been wondering about.
choice_data_list: <size=36>Why do you put so much effort into streaming?.</size>

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hmm… the reason is—

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's "Love"?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: ―Today, I mentioned my streaming to someone I ran into during training, they asked me, "Why do you put so much effort into streaming?"

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: [ It's only natural ] ...Yeah, I guess so. There are fewer days when I don't do it. It's been like that ever since I was little.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: [ Because there's Love! ] Haha, exactly! Here, there's the love I cherish—warm heartfelt feelings.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: I bring smiles to everyone, and everyone gives me their support. I bring energy to everyone, and everyone gives me courage.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: On days when good things happened, and days when bad things happened. Without putting on a front, I share my true self…

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: When we keep exchanging like that, don't you feel incredibly close? Everyone's feelings are right here with me, and mine are with you too.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Haha! I last showed a perfect test score back in elementary school, right! I definitely won't do that anymore.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: ...But you know, it's precisely within relationships where we can talk like this that I feel it. That thing called Love, you know.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Well then, see you next time♪
Love me~♡ Love you~♡ It's Loves Only You~♡
Recently, the racing world has evolved, blending sport with entertainment. Therefore, Umamusumes beloved by fans come in many different forms.
The traditional approach earns admiration through athletic achievements. Umamusumes show their power in races, and fans are captivated by that strength.
Another trend lately is showing charm beyond just racing. Many Umamusumes attract fans with idol-like talent.
The relationship between Umamusumes and their fans takes many forms, but for Loves Only You, is somewhat different from any of them.
I still can't quite put it into words—but I felt a sense of hope for the relationship she and her fans were building, one that seemed to connect to an unprecedented, new future...
